## Checklist
Thank you for your contribution!
Before submitting, please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] My code follows the project’s style and formatting conventions.
- [ ] I have **tested my changes** and confirmed that:
  - The new functionality works as expected, **and**
  - Existing features are **not broken** by this change.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed (e.g., README, comments).
- [ ] The PR title is clear and follows a conventional format (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`).
